example_tasks: Add missing metadata to research notes
Mark quarterly report for priority review
Identify required fields in application form
Highlight critical action items in meeting notes
Tag draft as needing final approval
Note special instructions for client delivery
Flag incomplete sections in technical documentation
Mark essential reading for team sync
Review flagged items in project backlog
Update mandatory fields in database entry
Annotate key findings in research paper
reasoning: The icon combines a document symbol with an asterisk, which is a universal signifier for 'required', 'important', or 'special'. It is highly effective for distinguishing tasks that need extra attention or have mandatory components.
